details: Paper 163 (PMC6146543) DOI 10.3390/70100038 matches; quote 'Caledonixanthone G ( 8 ): Isolated as orange prisms (MeOH); melting point 201°C' verbatim in Spectral Data section; value 201°C correct; measured.
Paper 093 (PMC6146903) DOI 10.3390/80800622 matches; Table II row 19 has '19 >300°C AcOH 62' verbatim; compound 19 is the 4-phenyl-thiazoline sulphone; measured mp >300°C.

Paper 003 (PMC12943044) DOI 10.3390/ph19020230 matches; full compound name '2-(8-Hydroxy-7-(morpholinomethyl)quinolin-5-yl)-4-nitroisoindoline-1,3-dione ( 7c ) Brown powder (30 mg, 70% yield); m.p. 219–222 °C' verbatim in Section 3; measured.
Paper 053 (PMC6147013) DOI 10.3390/80400363 matches; compound 10b experimental block has 'M.p. 244-246 o C; Calculated for C 18 H 14 BrN 7 O 2' verbatim; measured.
Paper 001 (PMC12938810) DOI 10.3390/antiox15020217 matches; AL8 synthesis section has full name and 'M.p.: 220–221 °C' verbatim; measured.
Paper 102 (PMC6236359) DOI 10.3390/60400300 matches; compound 25 experimental has 'amorphous powder (CHCl 3 /MeOH, 20:1), m.p. 291°C' verbatim; measured.
Paper 119 (PMC12943680) DOI 10.3390/molecules31040629 matches; FURL-G1 experimental section has '(FURL-G1). Yellow solid; yield 88.31%; mp: 91.1–93.2 °C' verbatim; measured.

Paper 181 (PMC10806150) DOI 10.3389/fchem.2023.1303479 matches; compound 1a in Section 2.2.1 has 'White solid; mp: 119°C–114°C' verbatim (range printed inverted in source as noted); midpoint value 116.5°C correct.
Paper 098 (PMC6146883) DOI 10.3390/80700541 matches; experimental section for compound 26 has 'Compound 26 was obtained as red crystals (60%), mp 254 °C' verbatim; measured.

Paper 099 (PMC6236343) DOI 10.3390/60300194 matches; anti-tosylate 10 has 'colourless needles (0.15 g, 20%) m.p. 105-105 °C' verbatim (note source-typo single-point range); measured value 105°C correct as-printed.
Paper 040 (PMC6146956) DOI 10.3390/80300342 matches; compound 5a experimental has '( 5a ). Yield: 2.2 g (46%); m.p.102-106 °C' verbatim; measured mp 102-106°C, midpoint 104.
Paper 054 (PMC6146489) DOI 10.3390/70700540 matches; Table 1 row '10b bright 79 223-224' verbatim, m.p. °C column gives 223-224; compound 10b is the 2-aryl-benzo[a]quinolizine.

Paper 035 (PMC6259131) DOI 10.3390/molecules15106759 matches; hydrazide 3 experimental has 'Colo[r]less crystals (0.32 g, 94%); mp 167–168 °C, IR' verbatim (quote intentionally starts mid-word at 'rless'); measured.
Paper 092 (PMC6236407) DOI 10.3390/60900784 matches; Table 1 row '21 53 62-65 methanol' verbatim; compound 21 is the bromobutyl pyridazinedione per Table 1 caption; measured mp 62-65°C.
Paper 097 (PMC6146420) DOI 10.3390/70200124 matches; experimental for 1c has 'compounds 1c ( 69%, m.p. 109-110°C)' verbatim; measured.
Paper 013 (PMC12943095) DOI 10.3390/molecules31040706 matches; compound 1h experimental has full name and '( 1h ). Yield: 78%; Mp: 85 °C' verbatim; measured.

Paper 165 (PMC6236387) Spectral Data has '2-Methoxyanthraquinone : mp 196°;' (extra space before colon in source); quote matches except for single-space punctuation artifact; value 196°C correct, measured.
Paper 006 (PMC13006720) DOI 10.1002/ardp.70227 matches; compound 10 experimental has full name and '( 10 ): Orange solid, mp 289°C–293°C' verbatim; measured midpoint 291°C.
Paper 080 (PMC9903363) DOI 10.1021/acsaom.2c00067 matches; 'Synthesis of 3,6-Di- tert -butyldiphenyldibenzofulvene [ 3,6- dtb -DPBF(Me) 2 ]' subsection ends with 'mp >300 °C' verbatim; measured.

Paper 005 (PMC12987641) DOI 10.1002/cmdc.202500751 matches; compound 11h in paper is '4‐(Diphenylphosphoryl)‐6‐(3‐Nitrophenyl)‐7H‐Indeno[2,1‐c]Quinolin‐7‐One (11h)'. Row's compound_name 'H‐Indeno[2,1‐c]Quinolin‐7‐One (11h)' is truncated — lost the '4-(Diphenylphosphoryl)-6-(3-Nitrophenyl)-' substituent prefix and the leading '7' of 7H. Quote 'mp 171°C‐173°C' verbatim.

Paper 021 (PMC10673159) DOI 10.3390/molecules28227590 matches; compound 10c experimental has full name and 'Yield: 26% as a yellow solid. mp 188 °C' verbatim; measured. CSV escape backslashes in compound_name are formatting only.
Paper 017 (PMC10673250) DOI 10.3390/molecules28227523 matches; Table 2 row '[Glu(OiPr) 2 ][HCl] 174.4 202.5 45.72 (11.887) −22.13' verbatim, T m column = 45.72°C; measured.

Paper 157 (PMC3716435) PMC match; quote '1 ·0.9 NMP (clathrate C); 18.5 18.3 160 243 202 −42' verbatim in Table 3 (paper labels Table 3 not Table 1 as row claims — minor location label mismatch but data is correct: Host melting T m °C = 243 for compound 1 = dehydrocholic acid in NMP clathrate); measured.
Paper 027 (PMC9188358) DOI 10.1007/s42250-022-00374-9 matches; experimental has 'Quinolin-2-ol. White solid; mp 193-195 °C' verbatim; measured.

Paper 164 (PMC7158184) PMC match; Dazomet section has 'It has a melting point of 104–105 °C' (row quote has extra space '104– 105' — one-space PDF whitespace artifact); compound and value 104-105°C correct, measured.
